textByHashes.551ab4c4af94ff866d7d134c9464a51e9813e6ec: Uh..... hi... didn't see you there. Can.... I help?
textByHashes.7534e84bf17b459675e2ec27a042a581c86eb798: Erm... yes. When I'm not drinking them.
